PropertyBoolean.name: enabled
PropertyBoolean.help: If this value is false, the range is not included in the configuration

PropertyNode.name: sourceIpRange
PropertyNode.help: Source ip address range in the underlying ip plugin to use for source address allocation when creating a L2TP tunnel

PropertyString.name: baseTunDestIp
PropertyString.help: Defines the base address to be used L2TP tunnel destination in the range

PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.help: Defines the increment to be used for enumerating all the addresses in the range.
